content.name: Hotkey API (POC)
content.author: Chem O`Dun
content.description: Proof-of-concept template for a custom hotkey registration framework: defines one map-only test action, lets the player bind a key to it via a Settings page entry, and reacts to it through a new generic UIX callback in the Map menu's hotkey dispatch.

text.description: Proof-of-concept template for a custom hotkey registration framework: defines one map-only test action, lets the player bind a key to it via a Settings page entry, and reacts to it through a new generic UIX callback in the Map menu's hotkey dispatch.
